  "rationale": "The alignment procedure was sequenced correctly per API RP 686 principles. Soft foot was checked and corrected to 0.001 inch at each foot before final alignment. Critically, the final laser alignment was performed after the suction and discharge flanges were bolted up, which ensures pipe strain effects are captured in the final readings. As-left readings were within the 1800-rpm tolerance table, and cold offsets for hot service were applied per the OEM growth chart. No sequence violations identified.",
